name: Incomplete Filtering of One or More Instances of Special Elements
description: The product fails to completely filter special elements before passing data downstream, either filtering only a single instance when multiple exist or not addressing all instances where several special elements are present.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data with multiple instances of special elements that flows through a CONTROL node (filter) that only removes some instances, leaving remaining dangerous elements to reach EGRESS or TRANSFORM nodes.
